User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the social media application.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

age.description: The user's estimated age from AI verification.

isVerified.description: Whether the user has been age-verified.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined.

bio.description: A short bio about the user.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a post shared by a user.

authorId.description: The user ID of the post author.

authorName.description: The name of the post author.

authorPhoto.description: The profile picture URL of the post author.

content.description: The text content of the post.

imageURL.description: An optional image URL for the post.

likes.description: An array of user IDs who liked the post.

commentsCount.description: The number of comments on the post.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the post was created.
